using System.Collections.Concurrent;
using System.Text.Json;

public sealed class BenchmarkContext
{
    public required string Repository { get; init; }
    public required string Model { get; init; }
    public required IReadOnlyList<string> Constraints { get; init; }
    public double Score(double[] values) => values.Where(double.IsFinite).DefaultIfEmpty(0).Average();
}

public enum RunStatus { Pending, Running, Completed, Failed, Skipped }

public sealed class BenchmarkRun
{
    public Guid Id { get; } = Guid.NewGuid();
    public BenchmarkContext Context { get; }
    public RunStatus Status { get; set; } = RunStatus.Pending;
    public double[]? Results { get; set; }
    public string? Error { get; set; }

    public BenchmarkRun(BenchmarkContext context) => Context = context;
}

public interface IDockerHarness
{
    Task<double[]> ExecuteAsync(BenchmarkContext context, CancellationToken ct);
}

public sealed class ResumableBenchmarkRunner
{
    private readonly IDockerHarness _harness;
    private readonly string _stateFile;
    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<Guid, BenchmarkRun> _runs = new();
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _serialExecutor = new(1, 1); // Ensures one model server at a time

    {
        _harness = harness;
        _stateFile = stateFile;
    }
